source_name: manual-collection
notes: This collection's fields are not standardized, and the data is not cleaned. It is only used for reference and manual labeling.

source_name: 手工收集_全国专精特新关键词政策表
url_or_origin: manual collection from central and provincial policy sources
notes: Manual keyword policy workbook for 国家 plus 32 local source labels. The keyword metadata contains 专精特新 for all rows; 4475 rows are dated 2020-2025 and 167 rows are dated 2026, so downstream analysis must apply the chosen date window explicitly.

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新辖区修正表v1
url_or_origin: manual review of source-label and policy-jurisdiction mismatches
notes: Reviewed source-label jurisdiction corrections for reposted policies. Processed outputs preserve source_label_original and province_before_correction while using corrected province for policy-jurisdiction analysis.

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新辖区修正表v2
url_or_origin: manual review of v1 plus 2019 supplement source-label and policy-jurisdiction mismatches
notes: Reviewed v2 correction table carrying forward the 15 v1 corrections and adding six 2019 supplement decisions. One 2019 安徽 row is reviewed_original; the other five 2019 rows correct reposted central or out-of-province policies.

source_name: 手工收集_全国专精特新政策记录v0
notes: Processed manual SRDI policy records for 2020-2025. 国家 is mapped to central; 新疆维吾尔自治区 and 新疆生产建设兵团 are mapped to province=新疆; reviewed reposted out-of-jurisdiction policies are corrected using manual_srdi_jurisdiction_overrides_v1.csv while source_label_original and province_before_correction preserve audit values.

source_name: 手工收集_省份年份专精特新政策强度v0
notes: Balanced province-year SRDI policy intensity table for 31 local province units over 2020-2025. central is excluded; two Xinjiang source labels are merged into 新疆; reviewed reposted policies use corrected policy jurisdiction.

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新Processed质量报告v0
notes: Long-form QA report for manual SRDI processed v0, including 167 excluded 2026 rows, missing-field counts, Xinjiang merge counts, 15 jurisdiction corrections, and intensity row count.

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新文本特征v0
notes: Row-level title/abstract text-mining features using a transparent v0 policy-tool dictionary. This is a candidate feature table, not a final hand-coded policy instrument label table.

source_name: 手工收集_省份年份专精特新文本特征v0
notes: Province-year text feature table joining policy-count intensity with title/abstract dictionary features for 31 local province units over 2020-2025.

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新政策工具词典v0
notes: Transparent v0 substring dictionary for supply-side, demand-side, and environment-side policy-tool features. Revised after no-hit review to cover service provision, factor guarantees, concrete exhibition/market terms, and financial-service environment terms.

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新政策工具词典覆盖v0
notes: Term-level coverage table for the revised v0 policy-tool dictionary, recording records_hit and total_hits for each dictionary term. Current dictionary has no zero-coverage terms.

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新词典修订效果v0
notes: Before/after effect table for the dictionary revision based on a 30-record no-hit sample, showing dictionary growth from 53 to 85 terms and no-hit reduction from 352 to 271 records.

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新关键词质量检查v0
notes: Term-level keyword quality check with coverage share, term length, and review flags for low/high coverage, short terms, and broad-meaning terms.

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新NoHit全量复核v0

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新NoHit抽样复核v0

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新NoHit汇总v0

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新文本挖掘质量报告v0
notes: Long-form QA report for the manual SRDI text-mining v0 outputs, including row count, province-year count, dictionary size, no-hit review sample size, keyword quality metrics, and broad tool-category hit counts.

source_name: 手工收集_全国专精特新关键词政策全文表
url_or_origin: manual collection from central and provincial policy sources
notes: Full-text version of the manual keyword policy workbook. It keeps the same policy universe as manual_policy_all_keyword_srdi.xlsx but replaces 摘要 with 原文 for title + full-text mining.

source_name: 手工收集_全国专精特新全文政策记录v1
notes: Processed manual SRDI full-text policy records for 2020-2025. Province normalization matches v0 and includes 15 reviewed source-label jurisdiction corrections; full_text is retained for text mining while v0 title/abstract records remain available.

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新全文Processed质量报告v1

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新2019补充全文政策表

notes: Supplementary 2019 full-text workbook used only by the v2 corpus path. 原文文本 is standardized to full_text; keyword_count is derived from title plus full_text because workbook keyword metadata is unavailable.

source_name: 手工收集_全国专精特新全文政策记录v2
notes: Processed manual SRDI full-text policy records for 2019-2024. The current full-text workbook contributes 2020-2024 records and the supplementary workbook contributes 2019 records; central records are retained row-level, empty full text is retained with fallback audit flags, and v1 outputs remain intact.

source_name: 手工收集_省份年份专精特新政策计数v2

source_name: 手工收集_专精特新全文Processed质量报告v2

source_name: 手工收集_省份年份专精特新全文文本特征v1

source_name: 手工收集_省份年份专精特新全文文本特征v2
